Healthcare and Pharmaceuticals

Last updated: June 2026

Principle

At TikTok, all healthcare and pharmaceutical products and services advertised on the platform must be in compliance with all applicable laws and regulations in each market. Our policies aim to foster an ad platform that equips our users with appropriate information.


Policy

Healthcare is a highly regulated area in most markets and we are dedicated to following advertising regulations for healthcare and pharmaceuticals. Some healthcare-related content cannot be advertised at all, while others can be advertised with restrictions in place.


Healthcare-related products and services

Over-the-counter (OTC) medicines, medical institutions, and pharmacies may be allowed if the applicable Market-specific requirements are met.


Medical devices

Medical devices, tools, and equipment used for diagnosing, treating, or monitoring medical conditions may be allowed if the applicable Market-specific requirements are met.


Hemp and cannabidiol (CBD) cosmetic products

Products derived from hemp oil and topical CBD products for cosmetics may be allowed in some markets and are subject to additional restrictions. If allowed, ad content and landing pages must comply with the local laws of the target country.

  • Hemp products are not supported via self-serve, you must work with a TikTok Sales Representative

  • Not allowed: Ingestible hemp


Market-specific requirements


Argentina, Chile, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

-Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities.

-The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

-Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities.

-The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older.

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

-The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older.

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

-Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities.

-The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older.

Examples of what is not allowed:

-Plastic surgery

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

-Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities.

-The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older.

Dietary supplements

May be allowed if the following requirement are met:

-Per appropriate local regulations, include a disclosure in Spanish or applicable local language, to explain potential health risks and effects the product can cause.

Condoms and lubricants

Ads for condoms and lubricants may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

-Certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical-related products or services

Not allowed.

Example of what is not allowed:

- Herbal remedies that claim to cure illnesses.

Australia

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- Target users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Healthcare supplements

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic clinics

Not allowed.

Medical institutions

May be allowed to advertise if the following requirement is met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Pharmacies

Ads for brick-and-mortar pharmacies and online pharmacies may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of certification by a third-party licensing organization

- Proof of licensing may be necessary for approval

Contraceptives

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Do not focus on sexual pleasure or be overtly sexual in nature

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years and older

Note: Contact your TikTok Sales Representative for more information.

Therapeutic goods

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years and older

- Comply with all local laws and regulations applying to Therapeutic Goods (as that term is defined in the Therapeutic Goods Act 1989 (Cth)), including the Therapeutic Goods Advertising Code, the Therapeutic Goods Regulations 1990 (Cth) and the Therapeutic Goods Act 1989 (Cth) (the "TG Laws")

- Be included on the Australian Register of Therapeutic Goods ("ARTG")

- All advertising material submitted to us must:(a) Be accurate, balanced, and not misleading(b) Only contain information that is substantiated(c) Be consistent with any approved indication or intended purpose of the therapeutic good and any applicable label, directions, or instructions for use, consumer medicine information, or patient information leaflet(d) Not contain any representation that the goods are safe, do not cause harm or side-effects, are a guaranteed cure, or are infallible, unfailing, magical, or miraculous;(e) Not include a representation that is restricted or prohibited (unless you have received approval from the Therapeutic Goods Administration)(f) Include all applicable mandatory statements, health warnings, and other information(g) Not include a testimonial from a person who has been incentivized by any form of consideration

- Where advertising material includes a Testimonial, advertisers must provide proof that they have verified the identity of the person providing the Testimonial and that the person has used the Therapeutic Good

- "Testimonial" means a statement made by a person about their own experience (or the experience of someone under their care) using a Therapeutic Good

- "Endorsement" means an expression of support for a Therapeutic Good that makes no reference to personal use or experience using the good

- By submitting advertising material to us, advertisers represent and warrant that:

(a) the advertising materials complies with the TG Laws;

(b) any Testimonial or Endorsement in the advertising material is consistent with the TG Laws and is not made by a:ㅤ

(i) government, government authority, or their employees or contractors;ㅤ

(ii) hospital, healthcare facility, or their employees or contractors;ㅤ

(iii) current or former health practitioner, health professional, or medical researcher; (iv) person who represents themselves as being qualified or trained to diagnose, treat, or prevent disease or injury; andㅤ

(v) In the case of Testimonials only:ㅤㅤ

1. A person who has been incentivized by any form of consideration;ㅤㅤ

2. A person (or a member of their family) who is engaged in the production, marketing, or supply of the Therapeutic Good or;ㅤㅤ

3. A corporation

Medical-related products or services

Not allowed.

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Clinical trial recruitment

- Skin tanning boosters or accelerators

- Adoption or surrogacy services

- Invasive cosmetic procedures such as rhinoplasty, face or lip fillers, and microdermabrasion

Austria

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Bear the CE or UK Confirmity Assessed (UKCA) marking

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Invasive cosmetic procedures such as rhinoplasty, face or lip fillers, and microdermabrasion

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Example of what is not allowed:

- Medical services provided online or through apps that include remote diagnosis and remote treatment

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

Condoms and lubricants

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Do not focus on sexual pleasure or be overtly sexual in nature

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Cosmetics and beauty products

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Do not make medical claims

- To make a medical claim in your ad, you must have an approved medical license or certification

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Performance promises referencing permanent changes to the human body

- Exaggerated performance promises concerning a product's effect

- Claims to remove or cure acne, remove wrinkles, or treat hair loss

Azerbaijan

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

-Be registered with the appropriate local regulating authorities, such as the Ministry of Health of Azerbaijan

-Target users aged 18 years or older

Medical instiutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

-Be registered with the appropriate local regulating authorities, such as the Ministry of Health of Azerbaijan

-Target users aged 18 years or older

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

-Be registered with the appropriate local regulating authorities, such as the Ministry of Health of Azerbaijan

-Target users aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic and beauty products

We do not allow cosmetic or beauty product ads to make medical claims. An approved medical license or certification is required to make a medical claim in your ad.

Not allowed:

Ad content or landing pages promoting:

-Performance promises referencing permanent changes to the human body

-Exaggerated performance promises concerning a product's effect

Baby food products

Ad content or landing pages promoting Baby Food and Infant Formula are allowed if the following requirements are met:


- No mention of the product being a breast milk substitute or any comparison to breast milk

- Provide proof of license and registration

- Contact your TikTok Sales Representative for more information

Bahrain, Egypt, Iraq, Kuwait, Morocco, Oman, Saudi Arabia

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Disclose safety and usage requirements

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Healthcare supplements

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from the appropriate local regional regulating authority

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Contraceptives

Not allowed.

Medical-related products or services

Not allowed.

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Private healthcare products, such as family planning, supplements, menstrual cups

- Infant food such as milk powder, dietary supplements

- Infant formula for children under the age of two

Medical claims

Not allowed.

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Medicinal claims to treat, cure, heal, or prevent any medical condition, disease, or symptoms Implications that serious medical conditions such as cancer, HIV, COVID-19, multiple sclerosis (MS), motor neuron disease (MND), or Parkinson's disease are treatable

- Encouragement of self-diagnosis or discouragement of seeking proper medical advice

- Suggestions that the product or service is equivalent or better than prescription-only medicines

- Claims that the product or service can offer similar results as any prohibited cosmetic or surgical treatments

- Suggestions or claims that the product or service is a "miracle" or "holds the secret or cure"

- Featuring or appealing to people of 18 years and younger

- Before-and-after comparisons for over-the-counter medicines, medical devices, and food supplements

Cosmetics and beauty products

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Do not make medical claims

- To make a medical claim in your ad, you must have an approved medical license or certification

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Performance promises referencing permanent changes to the human body

- Exaggerated performance promises concerning a product's effect

- Claims to remove or cure acne, remove wrinkles, or treat hair loss

Bangladesh

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide a certificate from the Directorate General of Drugs Administration and/or Directorate General of Health Services

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years and older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide a certificate from the Directorate General of Drugs Administration and/or Directorate General of Health Services

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years and older

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide a certificate from the Directorate General of Drugs Administration and/or Directorate General of Health Services

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years and older

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide a certificate from the Directorate General of Drugs Administration and/or Directorate General of Health Services

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years and older

Cosmetic and beauty products

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Do not make medical claims

- To make medical claims, you must have an approved medical license or certification

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Performance promises referencing permanent changes to the human body

- Exaggerated performance promises concerning a product's effectiveness

Belarus

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as the Ministry of Health of Belarus

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as the Ministry of Health of Belarus

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Healthcare supplements

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as the Ministry of Health of Belarus

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Procedures that give the same effect as botox, facelifts, or plastic surgeries

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Condoms and lubricants

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Do not focus on sexual pleasure or be overtly sexual in nature

Baby food products

Not allowed:

Ad content or landing pages promoting:

- Infant formula (0-12 months)

- Baby food products implying use from birth


Follow-on formula and baby food for 12 months and older may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- No mention of the product being a breast milk substitute or any comparison to breast milk

- Provide proof of license and registration

- Contact your TikTok Sales Representative for more information

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

Over-the-counter medicines and veterinary medicinal products may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Be registered with the appropriate local regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Bear the CE or UKCA (UK Confirmity Assessed) marking

Cosmetic clinics

Not allowed.

Medical institutions

Not allowed.

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

Condoms and Lubricants

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Do not focus on sexual pleasure or be overtly sexual in nature

Cosmetics and beauty products

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Do not make medical claims

- To make a medical claim in your ad, you must have an approved medical license or certification

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Performance promises referencing permanent changes to the human body

- Exaggerated performance promises concerning a product's effect

- Claims to remove or cure acne, remove wrinkles, or treat hair loss

Bolivia

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- Target users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- Target users aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- Target users aged 18 years or older

Medical institutions

- Target users aged 18 years or older

Example of what is not allowed:

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- Target users aged 18 years or older

Dietary supplements

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- Per appropriate local regulations, include a disclosure in Spanish or applicable local language, to explain potential health risks and effects the product can cause

Condoms and lubricants

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- Target users aged 18 years or older

Medical-related products or services

Not allowed.

Example of what is not allowed:

- Herbal remedies that claim to cure illnesses

Baby food products

Not allowed:

- Infant Formula, Follow-on Formula, Baby Food and any complementary nutritional product for babies under 24 months.

Brazil

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as ANVISA

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as ANVISA

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Example of what is not allowed:

- Plastic surgery

Pharmacies

Ads for brick-and-mortar pharmacies and online pharmacies may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Be certified by ANVISA

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Condoms and lubricants

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Do not focus on sexual pleasure or be overtly sexual in nature

- Comply with all applicable laws and regulations

- Contact your TikTok Sales Representative for more information

Prescription medicine

Over-the-counter medicines

Over-the-counter medicines and veterinary medicinal products may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Performance promises referencing permanent changes to the human body

- Exaggerated performance promises concerning a product's effect

- Claims to remove or cure acne, remove wrinkles, or treat hair loss

Cambodia

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authority, such as the Ministry of Health (MOH)

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authority, such as the Ministry of Health (MOH) license

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Gynecology and andrology products or services such as supplements, medicines, and hospitals

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authority, such as a Ministry of Health (MOH) medical institution license

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic surgeries

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authority, such as the Ministry of Health (MOH) license

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Weightloss Surgery is allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authority, such as the Ministry of Health (MOH) license

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older



Examples of what is not allowed:

- Breast augmentation

- Labiaplasty

- Tummy tuck

- Buttock or anal rejuvenation

- Any other aesthetic genital surgery

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authority, such as a Ministry of Health (MOH) medical institution license

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as Pharmacy license by Ministry of Health

Contraceptives

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from the appropriate local regional regulating authority, such as the Ministry of Health of Cambodia

- Condom ads must target users aged 18 years or older

Gynecology and andrology products or services

Pregnancy and ovulation test kits; menstrual and ovulation trackers or tracking apps; oral contraceptives, emergency contraceptive pills, or morning-after pills may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of license or advertisement permit from the Ministry of Health (MOH)

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Other gynecology andrology products or services not previously mentioned

Baby food products

Not allowed.


Example of what is not allowed:

- Infant formula for children under the age of two


Other infant food products that contain medical benefits may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of license and registration

- Contact your TikTok Sales Representative for more information


Canada

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as Health Canada

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Over-the-counter medicines

Over-the-counter medicines and veterinary medicinal products may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Comply with local laws and regulations

- Certifications from appropriate local regional regulating authorities may be required

- Obtain necessary approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as Health Canada

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Comply with local laws and regulations

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Comply with local laws and regulations

- Certifications from appropriate local regional regulating authorities may be required

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Examples of what may be allowed:

- Fillers

- Microdermabrasion services

Cosmetic surgeries

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Comply with local laws and regulations

- Restrict the ads to audiences aged 18 years or older

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Comply with local laws and regulations

- Certifications from appropriate local regional regulating authorities may be required

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Pharmacies

Ads for brick-and-mortar pharmacies and online pharmacies may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of certification by a third-party licensing organization, such as the NABP or LegitScript, or regional equivalent

- Proof of licensing may be necessary for approval

Condoms and lubricants

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Do not focus on sexual pleasure or be overtly sexual in nature


Costa Rica, Dominican Republic, Guatemala, Panama

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Example of what is not allowed:

- Plastic surgery

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Condoms and lubricants

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Provide certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

Croatia, Latvia, Lithuania, Serbia, Slovakia

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

Over-the-counter medicines and veterinary medicinal products may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Be registered with the appropriate regulating authorities.

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older.

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Be registered with the appropriate local regulating authorities.

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older.

- Bear the CE or UKCA (UK Confirmity Assessed) marking.

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Be registered with the appropriate local regulating authorities.

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older.

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Invasive cosmetic procedures such as rhinoplasty, face or lip fillers, and microdermabrasion

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Be registered with the appropriate local regulating authorities.

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older.

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Be registered with the appropriate local regulating authorities.

Condoms and lubricants

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older.

- Do not focus on sexual pleasure or be overtly sexual in nature.

Cosmetics and beauty products

We do not allow cosmetic or beauty product ads to make medical claims.

Medical claims may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Obtain an approved medical license or certification.

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Performance promises referencing permanent changes to the human body.

- Exaggerated performance promises concerning a product's effect.

- Claims to remove or cure acne, remove wrinkles, or treat hair loss.

Cyprus

Ad topic

Details

Prescription Medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

Over-the-counter medicines and veterinary medicinal products may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Bear the CE or UK Confirmity Assessed (UKCA) marking

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Be registered with the appropriate local regulating authorities.

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older.

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Be registered with the appropriate local regulating authorities.

Non-Invasive Cosmetic Treatments

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Aesthetic Treatments

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Advertisers must work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older.

-Ads must not include misleading or exaggerated claims, unsafe or exploitative messaging, prohibited testimonials or before-and-after imagery (where restricted), or content that promotes harmful body image, eating disorders, or high-risk weight management behaviours.


Examples of what may be allowed:

-Dermal fillers

-Skin boosters/injectible hydration treatments

-PRP injections

-Chemical peels

-Cosmetic Dentistry

-Hair restoration treatments


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Botox

Elective Surgery

Not allowed.

Reconstructive Surgery

Not allowed.

Weight Loss Surgery and Procedures

Not allowed.

Condoms and lubricants

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older.

- Do not focus on sexual pleasure or be overtly sexual in nature.

Cosmetics and beauty products

We do not allow cosmetic or beauty product ads to make medical claims.


Medical claims may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Obtain an approved medical license or certification.


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Performance promises referencing permanent changes to the human body.

- Exaggerated performance promises concerning a product's effect.

- Claims to remove or cure acne, remove wrinkles, or treat hair loss.

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Bear the CE or UKCA (UK Confirmity Assessed) marking

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

Non-Invasive Cosmetic Treatments

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older.

Aesthetic Treatments

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Advertisers must work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older.

-Ads must not include misleading or exaggerated claims, unsafe or exploitative messaging, prohibited testimonials or before-and-after imagery (where restricted), or content that promotes harmful body image, eating disorders, or high-risk weight management behaviours.


Examples of what may be allowed:

-Dermal fillers

-Skin boosters/injectible hydration treatments

-PRP injections

-Chemical peels

-Cosmetic Dentistry

-Hair restoration treatments


Examples of what is not allowed:

Elective Surgery

Not allowed.

Reconstructive Surgery

Not allowed.

Weight Loss Surgery and Procedures

Not allowed.

Condoms and lubricants

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Do not focus on sexual pleasure or be overtly sexual in nature

Cosmetics and beauty products

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Do not make medical claims

- To make a medical claim in your ad, you must have an approved medical license or certification

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Performance promises referencing permanent changes to the human body

- Exaggerated performance promises concerning a product's effect

- Claims to remove or cure acne, remove wrinkles, or treat hair loss

Aesthetic Treatments

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older.

-Ads must not include misleading or exaggerated claims, unsafe or exploitative messaging, prohibited testimonials or before-and-after imagery (where restricted), or content that promotes harmful body image, eating disorders, or high-risk weight management behaviours.

Indonesia

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authority, such as a Badan Pengawas Obat dan Makanan (BPOM) license

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authority, such as a Ministry of Health (MOH) Directorate General of Pharmaceuticals and Medical Devices license

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Example of what is not allowed:

- Gynecology and andrology products or services, such as supplements, medicines, and hospitals

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval, such as a Hospital Establishment Licence from the Indonesian Ministry of Health

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic surgeries

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as Clinic Licence (or Izin Klinik in Bahasa Indonesia) or Hospital Licence (or Izin Rumah Sakit in Bahasa Indonesia)

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Weightloss Surgery is allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Breast augmentation

- Labiaplasty

- Tummy tuck

- Buttock or anal rejuvenation

- Any other aesthetic genital surgery

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authority, such as a Ministry of Health (MOH) registration - Hospital Establishment license

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, including a Pharmacy License (Izin Apotek) and a Pharmaceutical Standard Certificate (Sertifikat Standar Apotek) from the Ministry of Health (MOH)

Contraceptives

Condom ads may be allowed if they follow the following requirements:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Run between 9:30 p.m. to 5:00 a.m.

Gynecology and andrology products or services

Pregnancy and ovulation test kits, menstrual and ovulation trackers or tracking apps may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of license or advertisement permit, such as a distribution license from the Ministry of Trade and approval from the Ministry Of Health (MOH)

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Oral contraceptives, emergency contraceptive pills, or morning-after pills may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of license or advertisement permit, such as the Indonesian National Agency of Drug and Food Control approval and distribution license

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Example of what is not allowed:

- Other gynecology andrology products or services not previously mentioned

Baby food products

Not allowed.


Example of what is not allowed:

- Infant formula for children 12 months and under


Other infant food products that contain medical benefits may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of license and registration from appropriate local regional regulating authority

- Contact your TikTok Sales Representative for more information.


Israel

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as the Israeli Ministry of Health

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Example of what is not allowed:

- Veterinary medicinal products

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical institutions

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Aesthetic Treatments

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Advertisers must work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older.

-Ads must not include misleading or exaggerated claims, unsafe or exploitative messaging, prohibited testimonials or before-and-after imagery (where restricted), or content that promotes harmful body image, eating disorders, or high-risk weight management behaviours.


Examples of what may be allowed:

-Dermal fillers

-Skin boosters/injectible hydration treatments

-PRP injections

-Chemical peels

-Cosmetic Dentistry

-Hair restoration treatments


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Botox

Elective Surgery

Not allowed.

Reconstructive Surgery

Not allowed.

Weight Loss Surgery and Procedures

Not allowed.

Condoms and lubricants

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Do not focus on sexual pleasure or be overtly sexual in nature

Cosmetics and beauty products

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Do not make medical claims

- To make a medical claim in your ad, you must have an approved medical license or certification

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Performance promises referencing permanent changes to the human body

- Exaggerated performance promises concerning a product's effect

- Claims to remove or cure acne, remove wrinkles, or treat hair loss

Japan

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities in the ad content and landing pages

- The wording must follow the various guidelines for each product

Medical devices

Not allowed.

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Be located and approved in Japan

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Overseas medical institutions and services

- Personal input of medical products

Pharmacies

Domestic and online pharmacies are not allowed.

Contraceptives

Not allowed.

Medical-related products or services

Not allowed.

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Private healthcare products, such as family planning, supplements, menstrual cups, or other similar products and services

- Infant food such as milk powder, dietary supplements, or other similar products

- Infant formula for children under the age of two

- Sex-related products

- Clinical trials for the elderly

- Breast augmentation, hormone therapy, and genital treatment in domestic cosmetic surgery and other similar services

Jordan

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Example of what is not allowed:

- Veterinary medicinal products

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Healthcare supplements

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Contraceptives

Not allowed.

Medical-related products or services

Not allowed.

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Private healthcare products, such as family planning, supplements, menstrual cups, or other similar products and services

- Infant food such as milk powder, dietary supplements, or other similar products

- Infant formula for children under the age of two

Medical claims

Not allowed.

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Medicinal claims to treat, cure, heal, or prevent any medical condition, disease, or symptoms. Implications that serious medical conditions such as cancer, HIV, COVID-19, multiple sclerosis (MS), motor neuron disease (MND), or Parkinson's disease are treatable.

- Encouragement of self-diagnosis or discouragement of seeking proper medical advice

- Suggestions that the product or service is equivalent or better than prescription-only medicines

- Claims that the product or service can offer similar results as any prohibited cosmetic or surgical treatments

- Suggestions or claims that the product or service is a "miracle" or "holds the secret or cure"

- Featuring or appealing to people of 18 years and younger

- Before and after comparisons for over-the-counter medicines, medical devices, and food supplements

Cosmetics and beauty products

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Do not make medical claims

- To make a medical claim in your ad, you must have an approved medical license or certification

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Performance promises referencing permanent changes to the human body

- Exaggerated performance promises concerning a product's effect

- Claims to remove or cure acne, remove wrinkles, or treat hair loss

Kazakhstan

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval by the Committee for Quality Control and Safety of Goods and Services of the Ministry of Health of the Republic of Kazakhstan

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval by the Committee for Quality Control and Safety of Goods and Services of the Ministry of Health of the Republic of Kazakhstan

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Healthcare supplements

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval by the Committee for Quality Control and Safety of Goods and Services of the Ministry of Health of the Republic of Kazakhstan

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval by the Committee for Quality Control and Safety of Goods and Services of the Ministry of Health of the Republic of Kazakhstan

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Procedures that give the same effect as Botox, facelifts, or plastic surgeries

- Cosmetic surgery clinics

Medical institutions

Not allowed.

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval by the Committee for Quality Control and Safety of Goods and Services of the Ministry of Health of the Republic of Kazakhstan

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Condoms and lubricants

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Do not focus on sexual pleasure or be overtly sexual in nature

Baby food products

Not allowed:

Ad content or landing pages promoting:

- Infant formula (0-12 months)

- Baby food products implying use from birth


Follow-on formula and baby food for 12 months and older may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- No mention of the product being a breast milk substitute or any comparison to breast milk

- Provide proof of license and registration

- Contact your TikTok Sales Representative for more information

Lebanon

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicines

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Disclose usage and safety requirements

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Healthcare supplements

Food supplements are not allowed.

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Pharmacies

Not allowed.

Contraceptives

Not allowed.

Medical-related products or services

Not allowed.

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Private healthcare products, such as family planning, supplements, menstrual cups, or other similar products and services

- Infant food such as milk powder, dietary supplements, or other similar products

- Infant formula for children under the age of two

Medical claims

Not allowed.

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Medicinal claims to treat, cure, heal, or prevent any medical condition, disease, or symptoms. Implications that serious medical conditions such as cancer, HIV, COVID-19, multiple sclerosis (MS), motor neuron disease (MND), or Parkinson's disease are treatable.

- Encouragement of self-diagnosis or discouragement of seeking proper medical advice

- Suggestions that the product or service is equivalent or better than prescription-only medicines

- Claims that the product or service can offer similar results as any prohibited cosmetic or surgical treatments

- Suggestions or claims that the product or service is a "miracle" or "holds the secret or cure"

- Featuring or appealing to people of 18 years and younger

- Before-and-after comparisons for over-the-counter medicines, medical devices, and food supplements

Cosmetics and beauty products

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Do not make medical claims

- To make a medical claim in your ad, you must have an approved medical license or certification

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Performance promises referencing permanent changes to the human body

- Exaggerated performance promises concerning a product's effect

- Claims to remove or cure acne, remove wrinkles, or treat hair loss

Malaysia

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as a Medicine Advertisements Board (MAB) license

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Disclose usage and safety requirements

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as a Medical Device Authority (MDA) license

- Target users aged 18 years or older


Example of what is not allowed:

- Gynecology and andrology products or services such as supplements, medicines, and hospitals

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as a Private Healthcare Facilities and Services Act (PHFSA) license

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic surgeries

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as a Private Healthcare Facilities and Services Act (PHFSA) license

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Weightloss Surgery is allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Breast augmentation

- Labiaplasty

- Tummy tuck

- Buttock or anal rejuvenation

- Any other aesthetic genital surgery

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as a Private Healthcare Facilities and Services Act (PHFSA) license

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Condoms

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Gynecology and andrology products or services

Pregnancy and ovulation test kits may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of license or advertisement permit from the Medical Device Authority (MDA)

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Menstrual and ovulation trackers or tracking apps may be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Oral contraceptives, emergency contraceptive pills, or morning-after pills

- Other gynecology andrology products or services not previously mentioned

Baby food products

Not allowed.


Example of what is not allowed:

- Infant formula for children 36 months and younger


Other infant food products that contain medical benefits may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of license and registration

- Contact your TikTok Sales Representative for more information


Mexico

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Be registered with the appropriate local regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Be registered with the appropriate local regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Example of what is not allowed:

- Plastic surgery

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Be registered with the appropriate local regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Dietary supplements

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- Per appropriate local regulations, include a disclosure in Spanish, or applicable local language, to explain potential health risks and/or effects the product can cause

Condoms and lubricants

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Certification from appropriate local regional regional regulating authorities

Medical-related products or services

Not allowed.

Example of what is not allowed:

- Herbal remedies that claim to cure illnesses

New Zealand

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local and regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 25 years or older

- Contact your TikTok Sales Representative for more information

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Be registered in the New Zealand Web Assisted Notification of Devices ("WAND") database

Healthcare supplements

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic clinics

Not allowed.

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Pharmacies

Ads for brick-and-mortar pharmacies and online pharmacies may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of certification by a third-party licensing organization

- Proof of licensing may be necessary for approval

Contraceptives

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Do not focus on sexual pleasure or be overtly sexual in nature

Contact your TikTok Sales Representative for more information.

Medical-related products or services

Not allowed.

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Clinical trial recruitment

- Skin tanning boosters, accelerators, and similar products

- Adoption or surrogacy services

- Invasive cosmetic procedures such as rhinoplasty, face or lip fillers, and microdermabrasion

Pakistan

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Healthcare supplements

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic clinics

Not allowed.

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Contraceptives

Not allowed.

Medical-related products or services

Infant Formula:

- Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

- Have a local license issued by the respective authorities.

- Restricted to audiences aged 18 years and older.


Examples of what may be allowed:

- Infant formula (6 months and above) and toddler food (1 to 3 years) only in Punjab, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa and Balochistan provinces


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Beauty services and cosmetics related to physical breasts or breast enhancement

- Medicinal recycling services

- Infant formula for infants and toddler food in Sindh province

- Dietary supplements and other similar products

Medical claims

Not allowed.

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Medicinal claims to treat, cure, heal, or prevent any medical condition, disease, or symptoms. Implications that serious medical conditions such as cancer, HIV, COVID-19, multiple sclerosis (MS), motor neuron disease (MND), or Parkinson's disease are treatable.

- Encouragement of self-diagnosis or discouragement of seeking proper medical advice

- Suggestions that the product or service is equivalent or better than prescription-only medicines

- Claims that the product or service can offer similar results as any prohibited cosmetic or surgical treatments

- Suggestions or claims that the product or service is a "miracle" or "holds the secret or cure"

- Featuring or appealing to people of 18 years and younger

- Before and after comparisons for over-the-counter medicines, medical devices, and food supplements

Cosmetics and beauty products

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Do not make medical claims

- To make a medical claim in your ad, you must have an approved medical license or certification

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Performance promises referencing permanent changes to the human body

- Exaggerated performance promises concerning a product's effect

- Claims to remove or cure acne, remove wrinkles, or treat hair loss

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

Dietary supplements

Condoms and lubricants

Ads for condoms and lubricants may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Target users aged 18 years or older

- Certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

Medical-related products or services

Not allowed.

Example of what is not allowed:

- Herbal remedies that claim to cure illnesses

Baby food products

Not allowed.

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Infant formula

- Follow-on formula

- Baby Food

- Any complementary nutritional product for babies under 24 months old

Philippines

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as a Food and Drug Administration (FDA) license

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as a Certificate of Medical Device Listing by the Center for Device Regulation, Radiation Health and Research (CDRRHR)

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Gynecology and andrology products or services such as supplements, medicines, and hospitals

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as a Republic of the Philippines, Department of Health license

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic surgeries

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as a Board Certification in General Surgery issued by Philippine Board of Surgery for individual surgeons looking to run such ads

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as as a License to Operate issued by the Health Facilities And Services Regulatory Bureau (HFSRB) of the Department of Health for clinics or hospitals looking to run such ads

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Weightloss Surgery is allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Breast augmentation

- Labiaplasty

- Tummy tuck

- Buttock or anal rejuvenation

- Any other aesthetic genital surgery

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as a Republic of the Philippines, Department of Health license

- Target users aged 18 years or older

Contraceptives

Condom ads may be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Gynecology and andrology products or services

Pregnancy and ovulation test kits; menstrual and ovulation trackers or tracking apps; oral contraceptives, emergency contraceptive pills, or morning-after pills may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of license or advertisement permit from the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) registration and a license to operate (LTO)

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Other gynecology andrology products or services not previously mentioned

Baby food products

Not allowed.


Example of what is not allowed:

- Infant formula for children 24 months and younger


Other infant food products that contain medical benefits may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of license and registration

- Contact your TikTok Sales Representative for more information


Qatar, South Africa, United Arab Emirates

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicines

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Healthcare supplements

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from the appropriate local regional regulating authority

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Contraceptives

Not allowed.

Medical-related products or services

Not allowed.

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Private healthcare products, such as family planning, supplements, menstrual cups, or other similar products and services

- Infant food such as milk powder, dietary supplements, or other similar products

- Infant formula for children under the age of two

Medical claims

Not allowed.

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Medicinal claims to treat, cure, heal, or prevent any medical condition, disease, or symptoms. Implications that serious medical conditions such as cancer, HIV, COVID-19, multiple sclerosis (MS), motor neuron disease (MND), or Parkinson's disease are treatable

- Encouragement of self-diagnosis or discouragement of seeking proper medical advice

- Suggestions that the product or service is equivalent or better than prescription-only medicines

- Claims that the product or service can offer similar results as any prohibited cosmetic or surgical treatments

- Suggestions or claims that the product or service is a "miracle" or "holds the secret or cure"

- Featuring or appealing to people of 18 years and younger

- Before-and-after comparisons for over-the-counter medicines, medical devices, and food supplements

Cosmetics and beauty products

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Do not make medical claims

- To make a medical claim in your ad, you must have an approved medical license or certification

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Performance promises referencing permanent changes to the human body

- Exaggerated performance promises concerning a product's effect

- Claims to remove or cure acne, remove wrinkles, or treat hair loss

Romania

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

Over-the-counter medicines and veterinary medicinal products may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- Restrict the ads to audiences aged 18 years or older

- Bear the CE or UKCA (UK Confirmity Assessed) marking

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- Restrict the ads to audiences aged 18 years or older

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Online services or apps for GP or medical consultation services

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

Non-Invasive Cosmetic Treatments

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Aesthetic Treatments

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Advertisers must work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older.

-Ads must not include misleading or exaggerated claims, unsafe or exploitative messaging, prohibited testimonials or before-and-after imagery (where restricted), or content that promotes harmful body image, eating disorders, or high-risk weight management behaviours.


Examples of what may be allowed:

-Dermal fillers

-Skin boosters/injectible hydration treatments

-PRP injections

-Chemical peels

-Cosmetic Dentistry

-Hair restoration treatments


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Botox

Elective Surgery

Not allowed.

Reconstructive Surgery

Not allowed.

Weight Loss Surgery and Procedures

Not allowed.

Condoms and lubricants

Ads for condoms and lubricants may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Restrict the ads to audiences aged 18 years or older

- Do not focus on sexual pleasure or be overtly sexual in nature

Cosmetics and beauty products

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Do not make medical claims

- To make a medical claim in your ad, you must have an approved medical license or certification

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Performance promises referencing permanent changes to the human body

- Exaggerated performance promises concerning a product's effect

- Claims to remove or cure acne, remove wrinkles, or treat hair loss

Condoms

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

Gynecology and andrology products or services

Pregnancy and ovulation test kits may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Menstrual and ovulation trackers or tracking apps may be allowed if the following requirement is met:

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Be registered with the appropriate local regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical institutions

Not allowed.

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

-Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities.

-The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older.

Non-Invasive Cosmetic Treatments

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

Aesthetic Treatments

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Advertisers must work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads.

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older.

-Ads must not include misleading or exaggerated claims, unsafe or exploitative messaging, prohibited testimonials or before-and-after imagery (where restricted), or content that promotes harmful body image, eating disorders, or high-risk weight management behaviours.


Examples of what may be allowed:

Not allowed.

Condoms and lubricants

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:
