Cosmetics and beauty products

We do not allow cosmetic or beauty product ads to make medical claims.

Medical claims may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Obtain an approved medical license or certification.

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Performance promises referencing permanent changes to the human body.

- Exaggerated performance promises concerning a product's effect.

- Claims to remove or cure acne, remove wrinkles, or treat hair loss.

South Korea

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as Ministry of Food and Drug Safety

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Include the deliberation number in the ad

- Contact your TikTok Sales Representative for more information

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Be registered with the appropriate local regulating authorities

- Provide medical deliberation numbers in ad content by KMA

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Invasive and non-invasive breast-related procedures

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Pharmacies

Not allowed.

Condoms

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Gynaecology and andrology products or services

Not allowed.

Baby food products

Not allowed.

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Infant formula for children 12 months and under

Other infant food products that contain medical benefits may be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- Provide proof of license and registration from appropriate local regulating authority

- Contact your TikTok Sales Representative for more information

Sri Lanka

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met; requirements are subject to change:

- Be certified by local health regulatory authorities

- Comply with all applicable laws and regulations

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Work with a TikTok Sales Representative to determine eligibility

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Gynaecology and andrology products or services, such as supplements, medicines, and hospitals

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met; requirements are subject to change:

- Be certified by local health regulatory authorities

- Comply with all applicable laws and regulations

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Work with a TikTok Sales Representative to determine eligibility

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Gynaecology and andrology products or services, such as supplements, medicines, and hospitals

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authority, such as Private Health Services Regulatory Council (PHSRC) of the Ministry of Health ('MOH')

Cosmetic surgeries

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authority, such as Private Health Services Regulatory Council (PHSRC) of the Ministry of Health ('MOH')

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Weightloss Surgery is allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authority

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Breast augmentation

- Labiaplasty

- Tummy tuck

- Buttock or anal rejuvenation

- Any other aesthetic genital surgery

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met; requirements are subject to change:

- Be certified by local health regulatory authorities

- Comply with all applicable laws and regulations

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Work with a TikTok Sales Representative

Contraceptives

Condom ads may be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- The ad must be restricted users aged 18 years or older

- Contraceptive products must be approved by the National Medicines Regulatory Authority (NMRA)

Gynaecology and andrology products and services

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Be certified by local health regulatory authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Examples of what may be allowed:

- Emergency contraceptive pills

- Menstrual and ovulation trackers or tracking apps

- Oral contraceptives

- Pregnancy and ovulation test kits

Thailand

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Be registered with the appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as Food and Drug Administration (FDA) license

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as a Food and Drug Administration (FDA) license

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Gynecology and andrology products or services such as supplements, medicines, and hospitals

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as the Department of Health Service Support (DoHSS) under the Ministry of Public Health

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic surgeries

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as the Department of Health Service Support (DoHSS) under the Ministry of Public Health

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older



Breast Augmentation or Weightloss Surgery is allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Labiaplasty

- Tummy tuck

- Buttock or anal rejuvenation

- Any other aesthetic genital surgery

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as the Department of Health Service Support (DoHSS), Ministry of Public Health, Thailand

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as a Pharmacy License from the Ministry of Public Health of Thailand

Condoms

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Not allowed:

- Ads for condoms that focus on sexual pleasure or be overtly sexual in nature

Gynecology and andrology products or services

Pregnancy and ovulation test kits; menstrual and ovulation trackers or tracking apps may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities (such as the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) license)

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Oral contraceptives, emergency contraceptive pills, or morning-after pills

- Other gynecology andrology products or services not previously mentioned

Baby food products

Not allowed.


Example of what is not allowed:

- Infant formula for children 12 months and younger


Other infant food products that contain medical benefits may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of license and registration

- Contact your TikTok Sales Representative for more information


Turkey

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

Not allowed.

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to audiences aged 18 years or older

Healthcare supplements

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to audiences aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic clinics

Not allowed.

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from local Ministry of Health

- The ad must be restricted to audiences aged 18 years or older

Pharmacies

Not allowed.

Contraceptives

Not allowed.

Medical-related products or services

Not allowed.


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Private healthcare products, including but not limited to family planning, supplements, menstrual cups, and other similar products or services

- Infant food such as milk powder, dietary supplements, or other similar products

- Infant formula for children under the age of two

Medical claims

Not allowed.

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Medicinal claims to treat, cure, heal, or prevent any medical condition, disease, or symptoms. Implications that serious medical conditions such as cancer, HIV, COVID-19, multiple sclerosis (MS), motor neuron disease (MND), or Parkinson's disease are treatable.

- Encouragement of self-diagnosis or discouragement of seeking proper medical advice

- Suggestions that the product or service is equivalent or better than prescription-only medicines

- Claims that the product or service can offer similar results as any prohibited cosmetic or surgical treatments

- Suggestions or claims that the product or service is a "miracle" or "holds the secret or cure"

- Featuring or appealing to people of 18 years and younger

- Before-and-after comparisons for over-the-counter medicines, medical devices, and food supplements

Cosmetics and beauty products

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Do not make medical claims

- To make a medical claim in your ad, you must have an approved medical license or certification

Examples of what is not allowed:

- Performance promises referencing permanent changes to the human body

- Exaggerated performance promises concerning a product's effect

- Claims to remove or cure acne, remove wrinkles, or treat hair loss

Ukraine

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- Restricted to audiences aged 18 years and older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- Restricted to audiences aged 18 years and older

Healthcare supplements

Not allowed.

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Be registered with the appropriate local regulating authorities

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- Restricted to audiences aged 18 years and older


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Procedures that give the same effect as botox, facelifts, or plastic surgeries

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Be registered with the appropriate local regulating authorities

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- Restricted to audiences aged 18 years and older

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Be registered with the appropriate local regulating authorities

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- Restricted to audiences aged 18 years and older


United States

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as the US Food and Drug Administration (FDA)

- Restrict the ads to audiences aged 18 years or older

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Comply with local laws and regulations

- Certifications from appropriate local regional regulating authorities may be required

- Obtain necessary approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as the US Food and Drug Administration (FDA)

- Restrict the ads to audiences aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Comply with local laws and regulations

- Certifications from appropriate local regional regulating authorities may be required

- Restrict the ads to audiences aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Comply with local laws and regulations

- Restrict the ads to audiences aged 18 years or older


Examples of what may be allowed:

- Fillers

- Microdermabrasion services

Cosmetic surgeries

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Comply with local laws and regulations

- Restrict the ads to audiences aged 18 years or older

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Comply with local laws and regulations

- Certifications from appropriate local regional regulating authorities may be required

- Restrict the ads to audiences aged 18 years or older

Pharmacies

Ads for brick-and-mortar pharmacies and online pharmacies may be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- Provide proof of certification by a third-party licensing organization, such as the National Association of Boards of Pharmacy (NABP) or LegitScript, or regional equivalent

Condoms and lubricants

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Restrict the ads to audiences aged 18 years or older

- Do not focus on sexual pleasure or be overtly sexual in nature

Cannabidiol (CBD) products

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Work with a TikTok Sales representative

- Comply with all applicable local laws and regulations concerning CBD product production, sale, and advertising, including any specific restrictions or bans in certain regions

- Provide proof of certification by LegitScript

- Restrict the ads to audiences aged 25 years or older


Example of what may be allowed:

- Topical hemp products that contain less than 0.3% THC.

- All other CBD products are not allowed.


Uruguay

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Example of what is not allowed:

- Plastic surgery

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Dietary supplements

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- Per appropriate local regulations, include a disclosure in Spanish, or applicable local language, to explain potential health risks and/or effects the product can cause

Condoms and lubricants

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Possess certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- Do not focus on sexual pleasure or be overtly sexual in nature

Medical-related products or services

Not allowed.

Example of what is not allowed:

- Herbal remedies that claim to cure illnesses

Vietnam

Ad topic

Details

Prescription medicine

Not allowed.

Over-the-counter medicines

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as a Drug Administration of Vietnam (DAV) license

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Medical devices

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as a Ministry of Health (MOH) Medical Device license

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Gynecology and andrology products or services such as supplements, medicines, and hospitals

Cosmetic clinics

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as a Ministry of Health (MOH) license

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Cosmetic surgeries

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authority, such as the Ministry of Health (MOH) license

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Breast Augmentation or Weightloss Surgery is allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Work with a TikTok sales representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Labiaplasty

- Tummy tuck

- Buttock or anal rejuvenation

- Any other aesthetic genital surgery

Alcohol-related Establishments

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regulating authorities, such as the Ministry of Health

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

- Work with a TikTok Sales Representative to determine eligibility and obtain permission to run ads


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Weightloss Surgeries

- Labiaplasty

- Tummy tuck

- Buttock or anal rejuvenation

- Any other aesthetic genital surgery

Medical institutions

May be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, Ministry of Health (MOH) - Medical Institution license

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older

Pharmacies

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- Provide proof of approval and certification from appropriate local regional regulating authorities, such as a Certificate of eligibility for pharmacy business by the Ministry of Health of Vietnam

Condoms

May be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Ads for condoms that focus on sexual pleasure or be overtly sexual in nature.

Gynecology and andrology products or services

Pregnancy and ovulation test kits, menstrual and ovulation trackers or tracking apps; oral contraceptives, emergency contraceptive pills, or morning-after pills may be allowed if the following requirement is met:

- The ad must be restricted to users aged 18 years or older


Examples of what is not allowed:

- Other gynecology andrology products or services not previously mentioned

Baby food products

Not allowed:

Example of what is not allowed:

- Infant formula for children 6 months and younger


Other infant food products that contain medical benefits may be allowed if the following requirements are met:

- Provide proof of license and registration

- Contact your TikTok Sales Representative for more information


Promote on TikTok

In the following markets, Promote is the only form of paid ads that is allowed:

Albania, Brunei, El Salvador, Ethiopia, Honduras, Kyrgyzstan, Laos, Libya, Mali, Mauritius, Monaco, Myanmar, Nicaragua, Senegal, Tanzania, Uganda
